zh.Headington, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾希阿丁頓
zh.Whitford, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Basset於1192年出生在英國奧可福爾希阿丁頓時，她的父親Thomas Basset Lord of Headington36歲，母親Philippa Malbank24歲。她於1210年與Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1235年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Basset于1192年出生在英国奧可福爾希阿丁頓时，她的父亲Thomas Basset Lord of Headington36岁，母亲Philippa Malbank24岁。她于1210年与Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1235年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Basset was born in 1192, in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, was 36 and her mother, Philippa Malbank, was 24. She married Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. in 1210, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died after 1235.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Basset est née en 1192, à Headington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Philippa Malbank, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. en 1210, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1235.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Basset 1192 in Headington, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Basset Lord of Headington 36 und ihre Mutter Philippa Malbank 24. Sie hat 1210 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1235.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Basset è nata il nel 1192 nel Headington, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Philippa Malbank, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. nel 1210, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1235.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Bassetが1192年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘディントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Basset Lord of Headingtonは36歳，母Philippa Malbankは24歳であった。1210年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでReginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1235年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Basset(이)가 1192년 영국 스퍼드실르 헤딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Basset Lord of Headington(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Malbank(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1235년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Basset nasceu em 1192, em Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Malbank, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. em 1210, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1235.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Basset родилась в 1192 г. в местности хидингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Basset Lord of Headington было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Malbank, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. в 1210 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1235 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Basset nació en 1192, en Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Basset Lord of Headington, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Philippa Malbank, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. en 1210, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de 1235.
